description: Compact LLM-readable catalog for microservices.sh modules. Read the referenced Markdown docs for full payload, response, event, hook, secret, and permission details.

agentGuidance.sourceOwnershipDefault: user-owned repository with branch/PR or patch workflow

moduleClasses.core: First-party application capability maintained by microservices.sh.
moduleClasses.provider: Full third-party service implementation, including API logic, webhooks, schemas, tests, and deployment configuration.
moduleClasses.connector: Low-level internal client used by provider modules. Users should normally install provider modules instead.

modules.name: Auth
modules.summary: Passwordless identity, sessions, roles, route protection, and auth audit events.

modules.name: Customer
modules.summary: Customer profiles, contact fields, tags, consent fields, notes, and customer lifecycle events.

modules.name: Booking
modules.summary: Bookable services, availability, booking creation, confirmation, cancellation, and booking lifecycle events.

modules.name: Stripe Payment
modules.summary: Full Stripe payment workflow: products, prices, checkout, payment links, webhooks, refunds, and payment events.

modules.name: Email
modules.summary: Transactional email templates, provider adapters, delivery jobs, and delivery events.

modules.name: Audit Log
modules.summary: Mutation audit trail and domain event recording with actor, action, resource, request id, and metadata.
